response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of req/s), plus current AI-agent infrastructure work. However, the resume shows no explicit experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or growth/measurement systems — the core of this Principal IC6 role. Title progression (Senior/Staff) and lack of demonstrated cross-team platform leadership at Principal scale also raise questions about IC6 fit.
strengths: Strong polyglot fundamentals across TS/Node, C/C++, Java, DLang with high-throughput production experience
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP, and developer tooling aligns with AI-first mandate
Track record of building platforms/frameworks (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts) and mentoring via workshops/talks
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing infrastructure
Resume lacks evidence of growth engineering, metrics/guardrails design, or statistical analysis work
Career level reads as Senior/Staff IC rather than Principal/IC6 with multi-team platform ownership

key_factors.factor: Deep polyglot engineering and scale background
